channel.title: Blog — Saurabh
channel.description: Thoughts on web development, AI, and building software.

item.title: How a Data Analyst Can Move into Data Science
item.description: A practical, honest roadmap for analysts who want to transition — what skills to build, in what order, how to leverage what you already know, and why you're not starting from zero.

item.title: The Impact of AI on Data Analyst Jobs
item.description: A story about what actually happened when AI entered the data analyst's workflow — what got automated, what didn't, who got hurt, and who got better.

item.title: Why We Divide by n-1 in Sample Variance
item.description: An intuitive explanation of Bessel's correction — why your sample mean is always a little wrong, why that makes your variance too small, and how dividing by n-1 fixes it. With Python simulations.

item.title: Building the Netflix EDA Dashboard — Python, Power BI & Streamlit
item.description: A complete Netflix content analysis: EDA on 8,800+ titles, a Power BI dashboard for business reporting, and a Streamlit app with content-based recommendations using TF-IDF similarity.

item.title: The Future of Data Analytics
item.description: How real-time pipelines, AI-augmented analysis, the lakehouse architecture, and the metrics layer are reshaping what it means to work with data — and what analysts need to learn next.

item.title: Revenue Leakage Detection & Pricing Optimization for E-Commerce
item.description: How I identified $9.54M in at-risk revenue across 47,000 products — surfacing discount abuse, pricing inefficiencies, and out-of-stock losses using Python, SQL, Tableau, and Streamlit.

item.title: Student Lifestyle & Academic Performance Analysis — ML from EDA to Deployment
item.description: An end-to-end ML project predicting exam scores from lifestyle habits — sleep, study hours, social media, diet — with regression, classification, clustering, and a live Streamlit predictor.

item.title: Building an AI-Powered SQL Business Intelligence Assistant with Gemini
item.description: Ask a question in plain English, get SQL generated by Gemini AI, run it against a real database, and receive a chart plus a business insight — all in one Streamlit app.
